# Railway Deploy Maintenance Instructions

- Keep module ownership clear.
- Update docs with behavior changes.
- Add verification steps before release.
- Do not introduce provider lock-in outside the module boundary.

# Railway Guidance

- Document services, variables, and environments.
- Keep project tokens out of source.
- Verify build/start commands and health checks.
- Record production URL and rollback notes.
